capability_questions.capability_name: Service exists and is in good condition

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a certificate management service?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether an enterprise certificate management service exists

questions.prompt: Is the certificate management service reviewed at least quarterly to measure its efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the service is reviewed on a regular cadence

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise formalize and document KPIs and KRIs for certificate management?
Are certificate management KPIs and KRIs reviewed at least quarterly?
Do KPIs track certificate expiry and auto-renewal compliance?
questions.evaluation_focus: Certificate expiry and renewal compliance metrics

questions.prompt: Do KPIs measure short-lived and ACME-automated certificate adoption?
questions.evaluation_focus: Short-lived and automated certificate adoption metrics

questions.prompt: Do KPIs or discovery scans identify unknown or shadow certificates in the environment?
questions.evaluation_focus: Unknown or shadow certificate discovery metrics

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a formal certificate management solution (internal PKI or managed CA)?
Does the certificate management system issue and revoke certificates for the entire enterprise or for a specific segment only?
Is the certificate management system capable of automating the certificate lifecycle (creation, distribution, and revocation)?
questions.intent: Evaluate automated certificate lifecycle in platform

questions.prompt: Is certificate platform configuration reviewed at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate regular certificate platform configuration review

questions.prompt: Does the certificate platform integrate with other systems without manual intervention to generate, distribute, and revoke certificates?
questions.evaluation_focus: Integration for certificate generation, distribution, and revocation

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have formalized documented processes for certificate creation, distribution, and revocation?
Do certificate lifecycle processes apply enterprise-wide or for a smaller segment only?
Are certificate creation, distribution, and revocation automated with protocols like ACME, SCEP, or equivalent APIs?
questions.evaluation_focus: Automated certificate creation, distribution, and revocation

questions.prompt: Are certificate lifecycle processes reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate regular certificate lifecycle process review

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a formalized process for issuing certificates to workloads, services, and APIs with machine identity attribution?
Does policy require short-lived certificates for workloads and APIs (for example 90 days or less)?
questions.evaluation_focus: Short-lived certificate policy for workloads and APIs

questions.prompt: Are workload certificates rotated automatically before expiry?
Does the enterprise scan for shadow or unknown certificates (for example certificate transparency logs or network discovery)?
questions.evaluation_focus: Certificate transparency or discovery scanning for shadow certs

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a dedicated official custodian for certificate management—or is it managed unofficially by the IAM engineer or Active Directory team?
